## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `make fmt` (Go and Terraform)
- [ ] Ran `make unit-test`
- [ ] Ran `make build`
- [ ] Ran `make docs` (if schema, resources, or templates changed; CI fails if docs are stale)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [project conventions](.agents/rules/local/project.md#commit-format) (`[#issue] | type: message`)
